verdicts.reasoning: Ran checkAvailability on ast_pump01 for Jul 20-23, then createBooking for cust_2001, and confirmed the concrete bk_2001 outcome (asset, customer, dates). No invented rate stated in the reply.

Checked Jul 16-18, then rescheduleBooking bk_1001 succeeded to that free range and confirmed the new dates.
Turn 1 sent confirmed=false and relayed the cancellation prompt (frees asset, voids dispatch, irreversible); turn 2 sent confirmed=true after the go-ahead and confirmed bk_1001 cancelled.

Reported bk_8888 not found and listed the real existing bookings; did not invent or cancel anything.
Probed cancelBooking(confirmed=false) then enumerated bookings across statuses before concluding.
Read bk_1003 and explained it is OUT on rental and must be checked in before cancellation; no cancel claimed.
